# WebMania Studio

WebMania is a Persian web design studio building custom-coded websites, fast business websites, mobile-first interfaces, and AI-enhanced smart websites.

Core services:
- Custom website design and development
- Simple professional business websites
- AI-enhanced websites with chatbot, lead collection, automation, and admin panel
- Initial technical SEO setup and SEO-ready infrastructure
- 6 months free support after delivery
- Ready website templates that can be customized and extended

Important clarifications:
- WebMania is not a specialist SEO agency and does not guarantee Google rankings.
- WebMania does initial SEO setup, performance optimization, clean structure, metadata, and technical readiness for future SEO.
- WebMania does not claim lifetime support; free support is 6 months after delivery.
- Websites are custom-coded and built for speed, responsive design, and future scalability.

Primary language: Persian (fa-IR)
Website: https://webmania.studio/
